description: Get the logs of a Kubernetes Pod (or workload name that will be resolved to a pod) in a namespace. Output is plain text, matching kubernetes-mcp-server pods_log.

clusterName.description: Optional. Name of the cluster to get the logs from. If not provided, will use the default cluster name in the Kiali KubeConfig

container.description: Optional. Name of the Pod container to get the logs fro

format.description: Output formatting for chat. 'codeblock' wraps logs in ~~~ fences (recommended). 'plain' returns raw text like kubernetes-mcp-server pods_log.

name.description: Name of the Pod to get the logs from. If it does not exist, it will be treated as a workload name and a running pod will be selected.

namespace.description: Namespace to get the Pod logs from

previous.description: Optional. Return previous terminated container logs

severity.description: Optional severity filter applied client-side. Accepts 'ERROR', 'WARN' or combinations like 'ERROR,WARN'.

tail.description: Number of lines to retrieve from the end of the logs (Optional, defaults to 50). Cannot exceed 200 lines.

workload.description: Optional. Workload name override (used when name lookup fails).

name: kiali_get_logs
title: Workload: Logs

description: Retrieves the high-level health, topology, and environment details of the Istio service mesh. Returns multi-cluster control plane status (istiod), data plane namespace health (including ambient mesh status), observability stack health (Prometheus, Grafana...), and component connectivity. Use this tool as the first step to diagnose mesh-wide issues, verify Istio/Kiali versions, or check overall health before drilling into specific workloads.
name: kiali_get_mesh_status
title: Get Mesh Status

description: Returns service-to-service traffic topology, dependencies, and network metrics (throughput, response time, mTLS) for the specified namespaces. Use this to diagnose routing issues, latency, or find upstream/downstream dependencies.

clusterName.description: Optional cluster name to include in the graph. Default is the cluster name in the Kiali configuration (KubeConfig).

graphType.description: Granularity of the graph. 'app' aggregates by app name, 'versionedApp' separates by versions, 'workload' maps specific pods/deployments. Default: versionedApp.

namespaces.description: Comma-separated list of namespaces to map

name: kiali_get_mesh_traffic_graph
title: Get Mesh Traffic Graph

description: Returns metrics for the given resource type, namespaces and resource name.

byLabels.description: Comma-separated list of labels to group metrics by (e.g., 'source_workload,destination_service'). Optional

clusterName.description: Cluster name to get metrics from. Optional, defaults to the cluster name in the Kiali configuration (KubeConfig)

quantiles.description: Comma-separated list of quantiles for histogram metrics (e.g., '0.5,0.95,0.99'). Optional

rateInterval.description: Rate interval for metrics (e.g., '1m', '5m'). Optional, defaults to '10m'

resourceName.description: Name of the resource to get metrics for

resourceType.description: Type of resource to get metrics

step.description: Step between data points in seconds (e.g., '15'). Optional, defaults to 15 seconds

name: kiali_get_metrics
title: Get Metrics for a Resource

description: Returns a human-readable text summary with current Pod CPU/memory usage (from Prometheus) compared to Kubernetes requests/limits (from the Pod spec). Useful to answer questions like 'Is this workload using too much memory?'

clusterName.description: Optional. Name of the cluster to get resources from. If not provided, will use the default cluster name in the Kiali KubeConfig

podName.description: Kubernetes Pod name. If workloadName is provided, the tool will attempt to resolve a Pod from that workload first.

queryTime.description: Optional end timestamp (RFC3339) for the query. Defaults to now.

timeRange.description: Time window used to compute CPU rate (Prometheus duration like '5m', '10m', '1h', '1d'). Defaults to '10m'.

workloadName.description: Kubernetes Workload name (e.g. Deployment/StatefulSet/etc). Tool will look up the workload and pick one of its Pods. If not found, it will fall back to treating this value as a podName.

name: kiali_get_pod_performance
title: Get Pod Performance

description: Fetches a list of resources OR retrieves detailed data for a specific resource. If 'resourceName' is omitted, it returns a list. If 'resourceName' is provided, it returns details for that specific resource.

clusterName.description: Optional. Name of the cluster to get resources from. If not provided, will use the default cluster name in the Kiali KubeConfig

namespaces.description: Comma-separated list of namespaces to query (e.g., 'bookinfo' or 'bookinfo,default'). If not provided, it will query across all accessible namespaces.

resourceName.description: Optional. The specific name of the resource. If left empty, the tool returns a list of all resources of the specified type. If provided, the tool returns deep details for this specific resource.

resourceType.description: The type of resource to query.

name: kiali_get_resource_details
title: List or Resource Details

annotations.title: Get Traces for a Resource or Trace Details

description: Fetches a distributed trace (Jaeger/Tempo) by trace_id or searches by service_name (optionally only error traces) and summarizes bottlenecks and error spans.

clusterName.description: Optional cluster name. Defaults to the cluster name in the Kiali configuration.

errorOnly.description: If true, only consider traces that contain errors (e.g. error=true / non-200 status). Default false.

limit.description: Max number of traces to consider when searching by service_name. Default 10.

lookbackSeconds.description: How far back to search when using service_name. Default 600 (10m).

maxSpans.description: Max number of spans to return in each summary section (bottlenecks, errors, roots). Default 7.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace of the service (required when trace_id is not provided).

serviceName.description: Service name to search traces for (required when trace_id is not provided).

traceId.description: Trace ID to fetch and summarize. If provided, namespace/service_name are ignored.

name: kiali_get_traces
title: Get Traces for a Resource or Trace Details

annotations.title: Manage Istio Config: Create, Patch, Delete

description: Create, patch, or delete Istio config. For list and get (read-only) use manage_istio_config_read.

clusterName.description: Optional cluster name. Defaults to the cluster name in the Kiali configuration.

confirmed.description: CRITICAL: If 'true', the destructive action (create/patch/delete) is executed. If 'false' (or omitted) for create/patch, the tool returns a YAML PREVIEW. Display it to the user and ask for confirmation before calling again with confirmed=true.

data.description: Complete JSON or YAML data to apply or create the object. Required for create and patch actions. You MUST provide a COMPLETE and VALID manifest with ALL required fields for the resource type. Arrays (like servers, http, etc.) are REPLACED entirely, so you must include ALL required fields within each array element.

group.description: API group of the Istio object (e.g., 'networking.istio.io', 'gateway.networking.k8s.io').

version.description: API version. Use 'v1' for VirtualService, DestinationRule, and Gateway.

name: kiali_manage_istio_config
title: Manage Istio Config: Create, Patch, Delete

annotations.title: Manage Istio Config: List or Get

description: Read-only Istio config: list or get objects. For action 'list', returns an array of objects with {name, namespace, type, validation}. For create, patch, or delete use manage_istio_config.

clusterName.description: Optional cluster name. Defaults to the cluster name in the Kiali configuration.

group.description: API group of the Istio object (e.g., 'networking.istio.io', 'gateway.networking.k8s.io'). Required for 'get' action.

kind.description: Kind of the Istio object (e.g., 'VirtualService', 'DestinationRule'). Required for 'get' action.

namespace.description: Namespace containing the Istio object. For 'list', if not provided, returns objects across all namespaces. For 'get', required.

object.description: Name of the Istio object. Required for 'get' action.

version.description: API version. Use 'v1' for VirtualService, DestinationRule, and Gateway. Required for 'get' action.

name: kiali_manage_istio_config_read
title: Manage Istio Config: List or Get
